name: Cheese Sausage Biscuits
recipeIngredient: 1 can Cheddar cheese soup (11 oz), undiluted
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble the sausage into a large skillet and add the onion.
2. Cook over medium heat until the sausage is browned.
3. Drain well on paper towels.
4. Combine all ingredients in a bowl, stirring until dry ingredients are moistened.
5. Drop batter by heaping tablespoonfuls about 2 inches apart onto lightly greased baking sheets.
6. Bake at 425 degrees for 15 minutes or until lightly browned.
